description.p: blunderDB is a desktop application (GUI and CLI) for importing, storing, searching and studying backgammon positions from eXtreme Gammon, GnuBG, BGBlitz and Jellyfish.

ul.li: Import matches from eXtreme Gammon (.xg/.xgp), GnuBG (.sgf), BGBlitz (.bgf) and Jellyfish (.mat)
Search positions by checker structure, pip count, equity, error threshold, dice and contact
Spaced-repetition (FSRS/Anki-style) flash cards for position review
Effective Pip Count calculator with embedded GnuBG one-sided bearoff database
Collections, tournaments and Match Equity Tables
